2604.06111.title: ACE-Bench: Agent Configurable Evaluation with Scalable Horizons and Controllable Difficulty under Lightweight Environments
2604.06111.paper_summary: Existing Agent benchmarks suffer from two critical limitations: high environment interaction overhead (up to 41\% of total evaluation time) and imbalanced task horizon and difficulty distributions that make aggregate scores unreliable. To address these issues, we propose ACE-Bench built around a unified grid-based planning task, where agents must fill hidden slots in a partially completed schedule subject to both local slot constraints and global constraints. Our benchmark offers fine-grained control through two orthogonal axes: Scalable Horizons, controlled by the number of hidden slots $H$, and Controllable Difficulty, governed by a decoy budget $B$ that determines the number of globally misleading decoy candidates. Crucially, all tool calls are resolved via static JSON files under a Lightweight Environment design, eliminating setup overhead and enabling fast, reproducible evaluation suitable for training-time validation. We first validate that H and B provide reliable control over task horizon and difficulty, and that ACE-Bench exhibits strong domain consistency and model discriminability. We then conduct comprehensive experiments across 13 models of diverse sizes and families over 6 domains, revealing significant cross-model performance variation and confirming that ACE-Bench provides interpretable and controllable evaluation of agent reasoning.
2604.06111.paper_summary_zh: 現有的代理基準存在兩個關鍵限制：高環境互動開銷（佔總評估時間的高達41%）以及不平衡的任務範圍和難度分佈，這使得總體得分不可靠。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了ACE-Bench，這是一個基於統一的網格規劃任務構建的基準，代理必須填補部分完成的時間表中的隱藏槽位，並遵循當地槽位約束和全局約束。我們的基準通過兩個正交軸提供了細粒度控制：可擴展的範圍，由隱藏槽位的數量$H$控制，以及可控的難度，由決策預算$B$管理，該預算決定了全局誤導性候選者的數量。關鍵是，所有工具調用都是通過靜態JSON文件解決的，這是在輕量級環境設計下進行的，消除了設置開銷，並實現了快速、可重複的評估，適合訓練時的驗證。我們首先驗證了$H$和$B$對任務範圍和難度的可靠控制，並且ACE-Bench展現出強大的領域一致性和模型可區分性。然後，我們在6個領域中對13個不同大小和類型的模型進行了全面實驗，揭示了顯著的跨模型性能變化，並確認ACE-Bench提供了可解釋和可控的代理推理評估。
2604.06111.author: Wang Yang et.al.
2604.06111.authors: Wang Yang, Chaoda Song, Xinpeng Li, Debargha Ganguly, Chuang Ma, Shouren Wang, Zhihao Dou, Yuli Zhou, Vipin Chaudhary, Xiaotian Han
